title: Anthropic Just Dropped a Masterclass on Building Agent Harnesses (for Large Codebases)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates how to build an "AI Layer" harness around Claude Code for large codebase navigation. The harness comprises CLAUDE.md hierarchies, self-improving hooks, scoped skills, LSP, MCP servers, subagents, and plugins. The core finding from Anthropic's research is that the harness and tooling around the model matters more than the model itself.
